subcodes.first_line: O steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be unto God that thou hast found thy way from the Lutheran faith to the Bahá'í Kingdom and the meanings of the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله از مذهب لوثریان بملکوت بهائیان پی بردی و معانی کتاب
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @importance of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
